# Haseloff Software Solutions — Full Information

> Software, die verkauft. / Software that sells.

This document contains comprehensive information about Haseloff Software Solutions for use by AI language models, search engines, and automated systems.

---

## Company Overview

**Legal Name:** Haseloff Software Solutions
**Type:** Software Development Agency (Einzelunternehmen)
**Founded:** 2021
**Founder & Owner:** Timo Haseloff
**Location:** Breite Straße 7, 39288 Burg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germany
**Service Area:** Germany, Austria, Switzerland (DACH region), remote worldwide
**Languages:** German (native), English (fluent)
**Website:** https://haseloff-software.de
**Email:** kontakt@haseloff-solutions.de
**Phone:** +49 1525 870 5975

---

## Mission Statement

We build digital products for businesses that mean it. No templates, no half-measures. Our software is strategically designed, cleanly built, and measurably successful. Every project is custom-built — no copy-paste, only solutions that fit the business.

---

## Services in Detail

### 1. Web Apps & Websites (Webanwendungen & Websites)

Fast, scalable web applications that win and retain customers. From strategic landing pages to complex business platforms — built to convert.

**What's included:**
- Custom-designed, responsive websites
- Progressive Web Apps (PWAs)
- E-commerce solutions
- Content Management Systems (CMS) integration
- SEO-optimized architecture
- Performance optimization (Core Web Vitals)
- Accessibility compliance (WCAG)

**Technologies:**
- React 19, Next.js 16
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Vercel deployment
- Strapi CMS / Headless CMS

**Starting price:** €2,500

### 2. Mobile Apps (Mobile Anwendungen)

Apps that users love and don't delete after a week. Native performance, thoughtful UX, seamless integration with existing systems.

**What's included:**
- Cross-platform mobile apps (iOS & Android)
- Native-like performance
- Push notifications
- Offline capabilities
- App Store optimization
- Backend API integration

**Technologies:**
- React Native
- Expo
- Firebase
- AWS Mobile Services

**Starting price:** €10,000

### 3. Custom Systems (Individuelle Systeme)

Backend architectures, APIs, and automations that make teams faster. Less manual work, more growth.

**What's included:**
- RESTful and GraphQL API development
- Database design and optimization
- System integrations (ERP, CRM, payment providers)
- Workflow automation
- Data migration
- CI/CD pipeline setup

**Technologies:**
- Node.js
- PostgreSQL
- Docker
- AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS)
- Stripe integration

**Starting price:** €10,000

---

## Working Principles (Manifest)

### Ergebnis vor Ego / Results over ego
We don't build software to impress ourselves. Every decision serves one goal: measurably moving your business forward. No feature bloat, no over-engineering. Every line of code has a purpose.

### Gebaut für Jahre / Built to last
We deliver code that works just as well in 3 years as it does on launch day. Thoughtful architecture, clean patterns, zero technical debt. We invest in maintainability from day one.

### Kein Ghosting / No ghosting
The real work starts after launch. We support, optimize, and scale — because good software evolves, it doesn't collect dust. Every client gets ongoing attention.

---

## Project Portfolio

### Heimbach Logistics Portal
- **Client:** Heimbach Logistics (mid-sized logistics company)
- **Scope:** Digital transformation — customer portal with shipment tracking, automated billing, route optimization
- **Stack:** Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Vercel
- **Tags:** Web App, Backend, API

### Stadtwerke Burg Customer App
- **Client:** Stadtwerke Burg (local utilities provider)
- **Scope:** Mobile app for meter readings, fault reporting, consumption analysis, push notifications
- **Stack:** React Native, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Firebase, AWS
- **Tags:** Mobile, Backend, API

### BBS Genthin — Modern School Website
- **Client:** Berufsbildende Schulen Genthin (vocational school)
- **Scope:** Complete website relaunch — responsive design, timetable integration, online registrations, digital bulletin board
- **Stack:** Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi CMS, PostgreSQL, Vercel
- **Tags:** Web App, Frontend, Backend

### Rechtsanwaltskanzlei Weber — Client Management
- **Client:** Law firm Weber
- **Scope:** Digital client management — appointment scheduling, document archive, automated billing, GDPR-compliant
- **Stack:** Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Vercel
- **Tags:** Web App, Backend, Database

### Elektro Müller — Customer Platform
- **Client:** Elektro Müller (electrical contractor)
- **Scope:** Online platform — cost estimates, appointment booking, digital invoicing, inventory system integration
- **Stack:** Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Docker
- **Tags:** Web App, Backend, API

### Dr. Hoffmann — Patient Portal
- **Client:** Zahnarztpraxis Dr. Hoffmann (dental practice)
- **Scope:** Patient portal — online appointment booking, treatment history, recall system, practice software integration
- **Stack:** React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS
- **Tags:** Web App, Backend, API

## Pricing Structure

| Service | Starting Price |
|---------|---------------|
| Professional Website | €2,500 |
| Web Application | €10,000 |
| Mobile App | €10,000 |
| Custom Backend System | €10,000 |
| Monthly Maintenance | €150/month |

All projects include:
- Fixed-price proposals (no hourly surprises)
- 3 months post-launch support
- Weekly development updates
- Source code ownership
- Documentation

---

## Development Process

1. **Initial Consultation** (free, no commitment) — Understanding your goals, requirements, and constraints
2. **Proposal** — Fixed-price quote with detailed scope, timeline, and milestones
3. **Concept & Design** — UI/UX design, information architecture, prototyping
4. **Development** — Agile sprints with weekly progress updates, demo sessions
5. **Testing & QA** — Cross-browser testing, performance optimization, accessibility audit
6. **Launch** — Deployment, monitoring setup, handover
7. **Ongoing Support** — Maintenance, optimization, scaling

---

## Technology Expertise

### Frontend
- React 19 (Hooks, Server Components, Suspense)
- Next.js 16 (App Router, SSR, SSG, ISR)
- TypeScript (strict mode)
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Zustand / React Context (state management)

### Mobile
- React Native
- Expo
- React Navigation

### Backend
- Node.js
- Express / Fastify
- PostgreSQL
- Prisma ORM
- REST APIs / GraphQL

### Infrastructure & DevOps
- Vercel
- AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, CloudFront)
- Docker
- GitHub Actions (CI/CD)
- Cloudflare

### Third-Party Integrations
- Stripe (payments)
- Firebase (auth, push notifications)
- Strapi CMS
- SendGrid / Resend (email)
- Sentry (error tracking)

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How long does a project take?
A professional website takes 3–5 weeks. A web app with backend takes 2–4 months. After the initial consultation, we provide a binding timeline with clear milestones — no surprises.

### What does it cost?
Websites start at €2,500, apps and complex systems from €10,000. You get professional code that lasts for years — not a WordPress theme that falls apart after 6 months. Contact us with your idea for a custom quote.

### What technologies do you use?
React, Next.js, and TypeScript for frontends. React Native for mobile. Node.js and PostgreSQL for backends. All proven, future-proof technologies used by major teams worldwide.

### What happens after launch?
3 months of free support are included with every project. After that, we offer maintenance contracts from €150/month including monitoring, updates, and performance optimization.

### How does the project process work?
Initial call (free) → Fixed-price proposal → Concept & Design → Development with weekly updates → Launch & ongoing support. You're in the loop at every step.

### How fast do you respond?
Within 24 hours, usually faster. For critical issues, also by phone. Because waiting days for a reply is unprofessional.

## How to Engage

1. Visit https://haseloff-software.de
2. Fill out the contact form or email kontakt@haseloff-solutions.de
3. Free initial consultation — no commitment
4. Receive a fixed-price proposal
5. Start building
